highest_supported_claim: Using one unqualified coarse numerical profile, 20 of 25 model-input combinations returned non-null values for all 14 declared measurements. Two of those reached the measurable low-movement guard. Five final geometries were saved but could not be evaluated by the declared wall-intersection measurement. The observations select confirmation cases; they do not identify factor effects or a process boundary.
next_decision: Run the eight nominated rows with paired numerical settings. Add independent center and narrow-case streams before the 54-case screen.
prohibited_claims: process qualification, optimum, or process window
